title: MD
biography: Rebecca Lee Crumpler was the first African American woman to earn a medical degree in the United States (1864). She treated freed slaves after the Civil War and published a medical textbook.
aiSummary: Rebecca Lee Crumpler is a medicine specialist at New England Female Medical College. Based in Boston.

timeline.title: First Black female MD in US
timeline.description: Graduated from New England Female Medical College

timeline.title: Published medical textbook
timeline.description: Published 'A Book of Medical Discourses,' one of the first by a Black physician
